name: Greek Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Feta Cheese, rinsed and crumbled
1/2 cup Chopped Green Onions, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook frozen spinach on HIGH until barely defrosted. Drain in a colander, pressing out moisture.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the spinach, cheeses, onion, parsley, and salt to taste. Mix well.
3. Mound mushroom caps high with the spinach mixture. Arrange on a serving plate and cook on HIGH until steaming - approximately 3 to 4 minutes. The spinach mixture may be formed into balls and frozen to be placed in mushroom caps just before microwaving.
